speaker: speaker1
text: Stupid girl , making me spend so much money , now I have to get it from the ATM ...

speaker: speaker2
text: Hello , welcome to Universal Bank . Please insert your card into the slot .

speaker: speaker1
text: I know where to put my card ! Stupid machine , talking to me like I ’ m an idiot ...

speaker: speaker2
text: Please input your 6 digit PIN code followed by the pound key . Thank you . Please select an option.Thank you . You have selected withdrawal .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah , yeah , I know what I selected . Just gimme my money !

speaker: speaker2
text: Please type the amount you would like to withdraw . Thank you , you want to transfer 10000 USD to the World Wildlife Foundation . If this is correct please press 1 .

speaker: speaker1
text: No , no ! Stupid machine , what are you doing ! No !

speaker: speaker2
text: Confirmed . Thank you for using our bank ! Please remove your card from the slot . Goodbye !

speaker: speaker1
text: No , no way ! What happened ? Give me my money !

speaker: speaker2
text: Danger , danger ! The exits have been sealed and the doors will remain locked in until the local authorities arrive . Thank you for using our bank . Have a nice day .
